summary: Successfully created 4 new use case inspiration files with realistic, anonymized examples. Each file follows the required template structure with Goal, Inputs, Pipeline, First version, Upgrade path, and Example starter prompt. All files are voice-optimized with short bullets and concrete steps, staying well under the 1500 character limit (1216-1278 chars each).
learnings: Use case files benefit from concrete pipeline steps that show the data flow clearly
Voice-optimized content works best with action verbs and specific technical translations
Character limits force clarity - every word must add value to the user's understanding
